global_description: A medium-sized, sleek water bird with a streamlined body and glossy black plumage. It features a long, slender neck and a pointed beak. The bird's feathers have an iridescent sheen, and it has webbed feet for swimming.

part_details.plumage: Glossy black with an iridescent sheen, covering the entire body.
part_details.neck: Long and slender, allowing for agile movement.
part_details.beak: Pointed and slightly hooked at the tip, dark in color.
part_details.feet: Webbed, aiding in swimming, dark gray to black.

spatial_relations: The long neck extends from the streamlined body.
The pointed beak is positioned at the front of the head.
The webbed feet are located at the base of the body.
